bead.title: ddx work: escalate to operator-attention after N consecutive identical pre-claim warn fingerprints
bead.description:
PROBLEM
Under warn-only policy a repeating pre_claim_intake warn (same fingerprint 15155a1c... across distinct bead_ids) made ddx work --watch loop forever — resource.preflight ok -> pre_claim_intake.warn -> loop.idle every ~50s — without ever claiming, looking healthy while a full fizeau queue stayed idle (2026-05-18). warn-only `policy_mode` masked a 100% failure rate with no operator signal.

ROOT CAUSE
`cli/internal/agent/execute_bead_loop.go` — the loop has a consecutive-wedge guard (`ConsecutiveWedgeThreshold`, default 2, :80-195, ddx-9714eaac) but no equivalent for repeated identical pre-claim warn fingerprints; a warn outcome only logs and continues, so the same warn fingerprint never escalates.

PROPOSED FIX
Track the most recent pre-claim warn fingerprint and a consecutive count; when the same fingerprint recurs N (default 5, configurable) consecutive times across attempts, emit an operator-attention event carrying the fingerprint and one example payload and stop silently looping. Reset the counter on any successful claim or a changed fingerprint. This folds in parent proposed-fix D (warn-only must not mask a 100% failure rate).

NON-SCOPE
Does NOT fix the decoder (decoder child) or the schema gate (schema child). Does NOT implement the rolling claim-success-rate warning (claim-rate child — a distinct trigger) or README docs (docs child). Cross-refs ddx-57c40485, ddx-8f2e0ebf, ddx-9714eaac.
bead.acceptance:
1. After N (default 5, configurable) consecutive pre-claim warn outcomes sharing the same fingerprint, `cli/internal/agent/execute_bead_loop.go` emits an operator-attention event including the fingerprint and one example payload and stops re-looping. Asserted by `TestPreClaimWarn_EscalatesAfterConsecutiveIdenticalFingerprints` (add).
2. The consecutive counter resets on a successful claim or a changed fingerprint, and a single warn does not escalate. Asserted alongside `TestSameBeadTwiceWedgeGuardStopsClaiming` and `TestWedgeMarkerResetsOnProgress` in `cli/internal/agent/consecutive_wedge_guard_test.go`.
3. cd cli && go test ./internal/agent/... green
4. lefthook run pre-commit passes
